personal.name: Sanjay Chalawariya
personal.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Brewing digital experiences, one commit at a time.
personal.bio: I'm a passionate software engineer with 5+ years crafting scalable, performant applications. Like a perfect espresso shot — I believe in precision, craft, and the right blend of technologies to create something extraordinary.
personal.coffeeOrder: Triple-shot oat milk latte, no sugar

about.headline: Building scalable systems with data.
paragraphs: I’m a 3rd-year B.Tech student with a strong foundation in full-stack development and a growing interest in data-driven technologies. I enjoy building web applications that are not just functional, but also efficient and user-focused.

My journey started with web development, where I worked with technologies like JavaScript, React, Node.js, and databases to create complete, end-to-end projects. Through this, I developed a solid understanding of how systems are designed and how different components work together.

Currently, I’m expanding my skill set into AI/ML and data science. I’m actively learning concepts like data analysis, machine learning models, and working with tools like Python, NumPy, Pandas, and Scikit-learn. I’m particularly interested in how data can be used to solve real-world problems and drive smarter decisions.
I’m always looking to learn, build, and grow—whether it’s through projects, new technologies, or real-world challenges.

projects.title: BrewTrack
projects.subtitle: Coffee Shop Management SaaS
projects.description: A full-stack SaaS platform for independent coffee shops. Features real-time inventory management, POS integration, customer loyalty programs, and AI-powered demand forecasting. Scaled to 200+ shops across 15 cities.

projects.title: BeanMap
projects.subtitle: Coffee Origin Explorer
projects.description: An interactive 3D world map that lets coffee enthusiasts explore bean origins, farm stories, and flavor profiles. Built with Three.js and WebGL, featuring 500+ coffee farms with rich media content.

projects.title: PourOS
projects.subtitle: Open Source Brew Timer
projects.description: A precision pour-over brewing assistant app for iOS and Android. Features guided recipes, grind size calculator, water temperature tracking, and a community recipe library with 10k+ downloads.

projects.title: RoastAI
projects.subtitle: ML Coffee Quality Predictor
projects.description: Machine learning model that predicts coffee quality scores from roast profiles and origin data. Trained on 50k+ cupping records with 89% accuracy. Deployed as a REST API serving 1M+ predictions/month.

experience.description: Leading frontend infrastructure and DX improvements for the deployment platform. Reduced build times by 40%, shipped the new analytics dashboard, and mentored a team of 6 engineers.
Worked on the Payments team building the next-gen checkout experience. Contributed to the React SDK and improved conversion rates across 500k+ merchants.
Early employee on the web team. Built the collaborative editing infrastructure, real-time presence indicators, and the initial mobile-responsive layouts that helped scale from 1M to 10M users.
Boutique agency building digital experiences for hospitality brands. Learned the fundamentals while shipping sites for coffee chains, restaurants, and lifestyle brands.

contact.headline: Let's brew something together.
contact.subtext: Whether you have a project in mind, want to chat about coffee, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open. I respond to every message, usually within 24 hours (fueled by espresso).
contact.availability: Open to freelance projects & full-time opportunities
